requirements.title: Install Stage Refactor
requirements.description: Refactor install.ts into 7 discrete stages with clear scope boundaries

requirements.title: Ink Output Layer
requirements.description: Create OutputRenderer abstraction with ink components

requirements.title: Store Onboarding Wizard
requirements.description: Implement interactive store wizard with Skip/Join/Create paths

requirements.title: Summary Card
requirements.description: Compress final output into boxen card

requirements.title: Error Presentation
requirements.description: Upgrade error visual weight with box styling

requirements.title: Progress Feedback
requirements.description: Add spinner and timing for long operations

constraints.constraint: MUST refactor install.ts from 2000+ lines to 7 discrete stages
Summary card MUST stay under 15 lines height
Error card MUST prioritize recovery over diagnosis
constraints.rationale: User needs actionable guidance, not technical details

constraints.constraint: MUST test wizard branching with mock state machine

domain.problem_statement: Fabric CLI install/uninstall flow has functional decoupling but weak user guidance. console.log/clack/writeStderr mixed system lacks visual anchors. Need unified ink TUI approach.

terminology.definition: React for CLI - Declarative component framework for terminal apps
Knowledge repository - Git-backed team knowledge storage
Atomic execution unit with defined scope, actions, idempotency, failure_mode
Unified rendering abstraction - Single component system for all CLI output

domain.audience: Fabric CLI users (solo developers, team members, project owners)

non_goals.title: Backward compatibility
non_goals.rationale: Zero users stated - no migration path needed

non_goals.title: Alias commands (fabric join/setup)
non_goals.rationale: User feedback: unnecessary - keep single fabric install entry point

non_goals.title: Non-CLI GUI
non_goals.rationale: Explicit TUI scope - browser/desktop UI out of scope

insights.summary: Current install.ts has 6 stages, not 7. Need to split global-layer from project-scaffold.
Wizard MUST NOT re-prompt when active_write_store already exists.
OutputRenderer interface maps 1:1 to UI components (stepHeader→StepCounter, summaryCard→SummaryCard).
Reuse uninstall.test.ts patterns for idempotency/dry-run testing.

open_questions.question: Should OutputRenderer support streaming output for long operations?
